title: diagnostics.py, repairs.py, services.yaml
acceptance_criteria: diagnostics.py async_get_config_entry_diagnostics redacts sensitive data and returns coordinator cache + config summary
repairs.py defines repair flow(s) for common misconfiguration issues (e.g. missing/invalid sensor entity)
services.yaml documents any exposed services (e.g. force_recompute) with field descriptions
All entries meet Silver+ quality scale requirements for diagnostics/repairs
